scripts.dev: nub run build && nub run --filter @genui/playground dev
scripts.eval: nub run build && nub run --filter @genui/playground eval
scripts.test: nub run build && nub run --filter genui test && nub run --filter @genui/playground test
scripts.check: nub run build && nub run format:check && nub run --filter genui check && nub run --filter @genui/playground check && nub run test:pack
scripts.typecheck: nub run build && nub run --filter genui typecheck && nub run --filter @genui/playground typecheck
scripts.lint: nub run --filter genui lint && nub run --filter @genui/playground lint
scripts.lint:fix: nub run --filter genui lint:fix && nub run --filter @genui/playground lint:fix
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json scripts packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.build.json packages/runtime/src examples/playground/package.json examples/playground/tsconfig.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json scripts packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.build.json packages/runtime/src examples/playground/package.json examples/playground/tsconfig.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
